items.title: Arcos Dorados to Participate in Upcoming Investor Events

(NYSE: ARCO) ("Arcos Dorados" or the "Company"), Latin America’s largest restaurant chain and the world’s largest independent McDonald’s franchisee, today announced its participation in the following investor events:

items.title: CAVA Stock Down 23% Post Q2 Earnings: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold?
items.description: CAVA's shares plunged 23% post second quarter despite earnings beat, as slowing comparable sales and macro pressures weigh on near-term growth.

items.title: Arcos Dorados (ARCO) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
items.description: Shares of fast-food chain Arcos Dorados (NYSE:ARCO) jumped 7.4% in the morning session after the company reported mixed second-quarter results that saw profits beat expectations but revenue fall short. The master franchisee for McDonald's in Latin America and the Caribbean posted earnings of $0.11 per share, easily surpassing analyst estimates of $0.08. However, total revenue of $1.14 billion missed Wall Street's expectations, growing just 2.8% year-over-year. While same-store sales, which track

items.title: Yum! Brands Is Pricey, Debt-Heavy, But Still Worth Holding
items.description: Yum! Brands excels globally via KFC and Taco Bell while debt remains as an obstacle.
